$comment:
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2026 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
name: nemoclaw
description: NemoClaw — run OpenClaw inside OpenShell with NVIDIA inference

scripts.test: npm run clean:cli && npm --prefix nemoclaw run clean && npm run build:cli && npm --prefix nemoclaw run build && vitest run --project cli --project integration --project installer-integration --project package-contract --project plugin --project e2e-support
scripts.test:fast: npm run clean:cli && vitest run --project cli --project plugin --project e2e-support
scripts.test:integration: npm run clean:cli && npm run build:cli && vitest run --project integration --project installer-integration
scripts.test:package: npm run clean:cli && npm --prefix nemoclaw run clean && npm run build:cli && npm --prefix nemoclaw run build && vitest run --project package-contract
scripts.test:coverage:cli: npm run clean:cli && npm run build:cli && tsx scripts/check-dist-sourcemaps.ts dist && vitest run --project cli --project integration --coverage --coverage.reporter=text-summary --coverage.reporter=json-summary --coverage.reportsDirectory=coverage/cli --coverage.include="bin/**/*.js" --coverage.include="src/**/*.ts" --coverage.exclude="test/**/*.js" --coverage.exclude="test/**/*.ts" && tsx scripts/check-coverage-ratchet.ts coverage/cli/coverage-summary.json ci/coverage-threshold-cli.json "CLI coverage"
scripts.test:coverage:plugin: vitest run --project plugin --coverage --coverage.reporter=text-summary --coverage.reporter=json-summary --coverage.reportsDirectory=coverage/plugin --coverage.include="nemoclaw/src/**/*.ts" --coverage.include="nemoclaw/src/**/*.cts" --coverage.exclude="**/*.test.ts" && tsx scripts/check-coverage-ratchet.ts coverage/plugin/coverage-summary.json ci/coverage-threshold-plugin.json "Plugin coverage"
scripts.test:live-e2e: npm run clean:cli && npm run build:cli && NEMOCLAW_RUN_LIVE_E2E=1 vitest run --project e2e-live
scripts.check: npx prek run --all-files --stage pre-commit && npx prek run --all-files --stage manual
scripts.check:diff: npx prek run --from-ref origin/main --to-ref HEAD --stage pre-commit && npx commitlint --from origin/main --to HEAD && npx prek run --from-ref origin/main --to-ref HEAD --stage pre-push
scripts.format:ts: cd nemoclaw && npm run lint:fix && npm run format
scripts.build:cli: tsc -p nemoclaw/tsconfig.shared.json && tsc -p tsconfig.src.json && node dist/lib/cli/generate-oclif-metadata-manifest.js && if find nemoclaw-blueprint/scripts -name '*.ts' -print -quit | grep -q .; then tsc -p nemoclaw-blueprint/tsconfig.json; fi
scripts.docs:validate: npm run docs:check-starter-prompt && npm run docs:check-agent-variants && npm run docs:check-routes && FERN_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./fern/fern.config.json').version") && cd fern && npx --yes "fern-api@${FERN_VERSION}" check
scripts.docs:strict: npm run docs:prepare && npm run docs:validate
scripts.docs:live: npm run docs:prepare && FERN_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./fern/fern.config.json').version") && cd fern && npx --yes "fern-api@${FERN_VERSION}" docs dev
scripts.prepare: if command -v tsc >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -x node_modules/.bin/tsc ]; then npm run build:cli; fi && (node -e "require.resolve('p-retry')" >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install --omit=dev --ignore-scripts) && if [ -d .git ]; then bash scripts/npm-link-or-shim.sh; if command -v prek >/dev/null 2>&1; then prek install; else echo "Skipping git hook setup (prek not installed)"; fi; fi
scripts.prepublishOnly: git describe --tags --match 'v*' | sed 's/^v//' > .version && test -s .version && cd nemoclaw && env -u npm_config_global -u npm_config_prefix -u npm_config_omit npm install --ignore-scripts && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc
